user.title: Tara Polar Station Tracker
user.description:
Set up the Tara Polar Station Tracker.

You need a free API key from [AISStream.io](https://aisstream.io/) (sign in with GitHub).

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please verify your AISStream API key.

abort.already_configured: Tara Polar Station is already configured.
